what_failed: Previous heartbeat session let subagent result route as DM instead of thread reply

lesson: When a subagent completes, ALWAYS post the result explicitly in the original Slack thread using slack-send.ps1 -ReplyTo. Never let OpenClaw auto-route the completion message - it will go to DM.
